creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Kevin, it would be great if your bugzilla account email matched that of your ports MAINTAINER lines. Also for future issues, please omit [tags] in Summary, and set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of.

In the near future, our Bugzilla automation extension will do this, but it wont if reporter-email != port maintainer email
